name: CADENCE DESIGN SYSTEMS INC
business: Cadence develops computational, AI-driven software, accelerated hardware, and silicon IP products for semiconductor and systems companies to design and verify integrated circuits and electromechanical systems.
sellsTo: systems companies (automotive, aerospace/defense, consumer electronics, data centers, industrial, medical, mobile, hyperscale computing, 5G communications, life sciences)

exposures.sentence: Cadence is a global technology leader that develops computational, AI-driven software, accelerated hardware, and silicon intellectual property (IP) products and solutions.
The first, Infrastructure AI, is powered by the demand for high-performance computing (HPC) and AI chips essential for data centers and hyperscalers.

Our customers include semiconductor companies that design and manufacture integrated circuits (ICs), as well as systems companies that design and manufacture electromechanical systems containing various types of semiconductor and other electronics.

These solutions, along with the rest of VLAB Works portfolio, address embedded software development challenges across several markets, including automotive OEMs, Tier 1 suppliers, and semiconductor companies, supporting trends like software-defined vehicles (SDVs) and software-defined systems (SDx).

Our Core EDA products and solutions are essential in the design and verification of semiconductor chips, including analog, digital, mixed-signal, memory, radio-frequency (RF), and silicon photonics, and are widely used across multiple industries including automotive, aerospace and defense, consumer electronics, data centers, industrial, medical, and mobile.
We also offer molecular modeling and simulation solutions and services used by a wide range of organizations in the pharmaceutical and biotechnology sectors to accelerate the drug discovery process.
Also in fiscal 2025, we strengthened our embedded security capabilities with the acquisition of Secure-IC, a leader in embedded security IP, solutions, and evaluation tools.
The second, Physical AI, focuses on embedding AI into physical systems like autonomous vehicles, industrial robotics, and automation.
The second, Physical AI, focuses on embedding AI into physical systems like autonomous vehicles, industrial robotics, and automation.

Our Core EDA products and solutions are essential in the design and verification of semiconductor chips, including analog, digital, mixed-signal, memory, radio-frequency (RF), and silicon photonics, and are widely used across multiple industries including automotive, aerospace and defense, consumer electronics, data centers, industrial, medical, and mobile.

The customers for these services primarily consist of semiconductor and systems companies developing products for the consumer, hyperscale computing, 5G communications, mobile, automotive, aerospace and defense, industrial and life science vertical sectors.

With this addition, we will serve a broader customer base, including leading aerospace and defense and automotive OEMs and Tier 1 suppliers, while addressing critical design challenges in electric vehicles, autonomous systems, and advanced materials.

catalysts.event: BIS rescinded license requirements for EDA Software and Technology to China
catalysts.sentence: On July 2, 2025, BIS informed us that the license requirements set forth in the May 23, 2025 letter from BIS were rescinded effective immediately.

catalysts.event: Entered into definitive agreement to acquire Hexagon's Design & Engineering business
catalysts.sentence: On September 4, 2025, we entered into a definitive agreement with Hexagon to acquire its D&E business.

catalysts.event: Announced M2000 supercomputer co-developed with NVIDIA
catalysts.sentence: In May 2025, we announced the M2000 supercomputer.

catalysts.event: Board authorized additional $1.5 billion for share repurchases
catalysts.sentence: In May 2025, our Board of Directors increased the prior authorization to repurchase shares of our common stock by authorizing an additional $1.5 billion.

catalysts.event: Enactment of One Big Beautiful Bill Act (OBBBA)
catalysts.sentence: On July 4, 2025, the One Big Beautiful Bill Act (OBBBA) was enacted in the United States.
